connectionTest.method: HTTP GET via proxy → API returns exit IP

usedBy: POST /api/research — Reddit public JSON search via mobile carrier IP (bypasses datacenter rate-limits)
GET /api/trending — Reddit r/popular JSON via mobile carrier IP
External web search (Brave/DuckDuckGo engine) via proxy for web platform results
notes: Mobile proxy used by proxyFetch() in src/proxy.ts for all Trend Intelligence API calls. Reddit rate-limits datacenter IPs instantly — mobile carrier IPs (T-Mobile 4G) are treated as organic users. Cross-platform synthesis requires the highest-trust IP type to avoid per-platform kills.
